title: Naming of fire station; Amite City
doc_html:
§4712.20. Naming of fire station; Amite City

            Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267, the governing authority of Amite City may name a fire station in honor of Bruce Cutrer.

            Acts 2019, No. 131, §1, eff. June 6, 2019.
doc_text:
§4712.20.  Naming of fire station; Amite City
Notwithstanding R.S. 42:267, the governing authority of Amite City may name a fire
station in honor of Bruce Cutrer.
Acts 2019, No. 131, §1, eff. June 6, 2019.
